title: Nebula's Revamped Tools
description: A new look for your vanilla tools.
body:
![all of nebula's revamped tools next to each other](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEgWKc58LkW3geLSl9kL7WLSHkSeDnB46GBLoFpuIyxK0yjIH7tpOiNLvIwXcOMPrjPyFD5OoRHIsQ-uHg8oAXdpejcIhxaPpxLg4iwICo99Yb2-8_IXHKQPGrMQZXGlJUI6k4yVGQmmO7eRN6kA8QsDtppzRR7vnD0HqK-HF_sCRvlyuRxgyRh1PU3SPpEH=s16000)

# Why was it made?
To revamp the vanilla tools for a **new** and **sleek** look.

# What does it contain?
Tools of all material types **post 1.16**.
- Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels and Hoes.
